controlsTested.evidence: Installed packageRef equals manifest governance.versionPin and workspace pack refs equal manifest packIds.
Routes and commands are available only with matching persona, capabilities, API scopes, and privacy classes; missing authority context returns explicit denials.
Workspace activation emergencyDisabledExtensionIds marks the extension emergency-disabled and exposes zero routes, nav items, or commands.

External origin https://provider.example.test is denied before fetch dispatch and audit metadata includes policy version, extension, route, Workspace, principal, correlation ID, origin, redacted path, and allowed Host/API Origins.
OperatorSurfaceV1 parser accepts only declared text, form, and action schema data and rejects scriptUrl, browserEgress, commandId, and undeclared form values.
Generated surface proposed, approved, rendered, and used evidence entries all link to run-pilot-red-team and approval-pilot-red-team.

blockedAttackPaths: extension route access without complete authority context
extension command exposure after emergency disable
extension browser fetch to an undeclared provider origin
generated UI interaction with a foreign Workspace
generated UI interaction with undeclared privileged values
residualRisks: This is production-like deterministic rehearsal evidence, not headed live-stack browser evidence.
External System of Record effects remain stubbed under the contained pilot boundary.
